rationale: max_depth=7 has been the best performer across multiple experiments (Exp 148, 151, 153, 155, 156) with consistent Brier=0.185762. Recent exploration of max_depth=8 (0.185830) and reversion to max_depth=5 (0.187596) both performed worse. Locking in max_depth=7 and exploring complementary regularization or tree count parameters next.
